-- WH01AM Key System UI
-- Compatible: Mobile + PC | Junkie Backend

local Junkie = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://jnkie.com/sdk/library.lua"))()
Junkie.service = "OutWest2"
Junkie.identifier = "1008164"
Junkie.provider = "OWC2PM"

local TweenService    = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService      = game:GetService("RunService")
local Players         = game:GetService("Players")

local LPLR = Players.LocalPlayer

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- ASSETS
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local LOGO_ID       = "rbxassetid://138253114092554"
local KEY_ICON_ID   = "rbxassetid://113183724100163"
local BG_ID         = "rbxassetid://126012234221208"
local DISCORD_LINK  = "https://discord.gg/HpJhQJRNMy"

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- FILE SYSTEM
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local function hasFS()
    return pcall(function() return type(writefile)=="function" and type(readfile)=="function" end)
end
local fsOk = hasFS()

local function saveKey(k)
    if not fsOk then return end
    pcall(function() writefile("wh01am_key.txt", k) end)
end
local function loadKey()
    if not fsOk then return nil end
    local ok, v = pcall(readfile, "wh01am_key.txt")
    return ok and v or nil
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- UTILS
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local function Tween(obj, props, t, style, dir)
    local tw = TweenService:Create(obj,
        TweenInfo.new(t or .3, style or Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, dir or Enum.EasingDirection.Out), props)
    tw:Play(); return tw
end
local function Round(obj, r)
    local c = Instance.new("UICorner"); c.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, r or 12); c.Parent = obj; return c
end
local function Stroke(obj, col, thick, trans)
    local s = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    s.Color = col or Color3.new(1,1,1); s.Thickness = thick or 1
    s.Transparency = trans or .85; s.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    s.Parent = obj; return s
end
local function Pad(obj, t, b, l, r)
    local p = Instance.new("UIPadding")
    p.PaddingTop    = UDim.new(0, t or 0)
    p.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, b or 0)
    p.PaddingLeft   = UDim.new(0, l or 0)
    p.PaddingRight  = UDim.new(0, r or 0)
    p.Parent = obj; return p
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- BLUR
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- No Lighting blur (affects whole screen) — use overlay instead
local _screenOverlay = nil
local function SetBlur(on, screen)
    if on and screen then
        local ov = Instance.new("Frame")
        ov.Name = "WH01AMOverlay"
        ov.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1,1)
        ov.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0,0,0)
        ov.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ov.BorderSizePixel = 0
        ov.ZIndex = 5
        ov.Parent = screen
        Tween(ov, {BackgroundTransparency = 0.45}, .5)
        _screenOverlay = ov
    elseif _screenOverlay and _screenOverlay.Parent then
        Tween(_screenOverlay, {BackgroundTransparency = 1}, .4)
        task.delay(.45, function()
            if _screenOverlay then _screenOverlay:Destroy() end
        end)
    end
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- INFO TEXTS (random)
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local INFO_LINES = {
    { title = "How to get a key?",    body = "Join our Discord server and\nfollow the key-link channel." },
    { title = "Key duration?",        body = "Each key grants you access\nfor 24 hours of gameplay." },
    { title = "Need support?",        body = "Open a ticket in Discord.\nWe respond within minutes." },
    { title = "Key not working?",     body = "Make sure you copy the full\nkey without extra spaces." },
    { title = "Multiple devices?",    body = "One key works on one device\nat a time. Re-use freely." },
}
local function GetRandomInfo()
    return INFO_LINES[math.random(1, #INFO_LINES)]
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- TYPING ANIMATION
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local function TypeText(label, text, speed)
    speed = speed or 0.045
    label.Text = ""
    task.spawn(function()
        for i = 1, #text do
            if not label or not label.Parent then break end
            label.Text = text:sub(1, i)
            task.wait(speed)
        end
    end)
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- BUILD UI
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local function Build()

    local old = parent:FindFirstChild("WH01AMKeySystem")
    if old then old:Destroy() end

    -- ── ScreenGui ──
    local Screen = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    Screen.Name = "WH01AMKeySystem"
    Screen.ResetOnSpawn = false
    Screen.IgnoreGuiInset = true
    Screen.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
    Screen.Parent = parent

    SetBlur(true, Screen)

    -- ── Main Window ──
    local Main = Instance.new("Frame")
    Main.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(.5,.5)
    Main.Position = UDim2.new(.5,0,.5,60)
    Main.Size = UDim2.new(0, 780, 0, 480)
    Main.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8, 12, 28)
    Main.BackgroundTransparency = 0.08
    Main.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Main.ClipsDescendants = true
    Main.ZIndex = 10
    Main.Parent = Screen
    Round(Main, 20)
    Stroke(Main, Color3.fromRGB(30, 60, 140), 1.5, 0.55)



    -- Subtle glass inner highlight

    local TitleLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    TitleLabel.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(130, 32)
    TitleLabel.Position = UDim2.new(.5,-32, .5,0)

    local TopSep = Instance.new("Frame")
    TopSep.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,1)
    TopSep.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,1,-1)
    TopSep.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30,60,140)
    TopSep.BackgroundTransparency = 0.6
    TopSep.BorderSizePixel = 0
    TopSep.ZIndex = 13
    TopSep.Parent = TopBar

    -- Drag
    local dragging, dragStart, startPos
    TopBar.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
        if inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
        or inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragging = true; dragStart = inp.Position; startPos = Main.Position
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(inp)
        if dragging and (inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
            or inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch) then
            local d = inp.Position - dragStart
            Main.Position = UDim2.new(
                startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset + d.X,
                startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset + d.Y)
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(inp)
        if inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
        or inp.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragging = false
        end
    end)

        btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            Tween(btn, {BackgroundColor3=hoverCol}, .18)
        end)
        btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            Tween(btn, {BackgroundColor3=baseCol}, .18)
        end)
    end

    SocialList.Parent = SocialCard

    local SOCIALS = {
        { name = "YouTube",  icon = "rbxassetid://119249200104247", url = "https://www.youtube.com/@WH01AMT3AM",                          color = Color3.fromRGB(255,60,60)   },
        { name = "TikTok",   icon = "rbxassetid://85094820294643",  url = "https://www.tiktok.com/@wh0wh3ar?_r=1&_t=ZP-958q3DfrUhr",     color = Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255) },
        { name = "Discord",  icon = "rbxassetid://126344909683494", url = DISCORD_LINK,                                                   color = Color3.fromRGB(88,101,242)  },
    }

    for _, s in ipairs(SOCIALS) do
        local row = Instance.new("TextButton")
        row.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,26)
        row.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(15,30,80)
        row.BackgroundTransparency = 0.7
        row.AutoButtonColor = false
        row.Text = ""
        row.BorderSizePixel = 0
        row.ZIndex = 15
        row.Parent = SocialCard
        Round(row, 7)

        local ico = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
        ico.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(16,16)
        ico.Position = UDim2.new(0,6,.5,0)
        ico.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0,.5)
        ico.Image = s.icon
        ico.ImageColor3 = s.color
        ico.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ico.ZIndex = 16
        ico.Parent = row

        local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1,-30,1,0)
        lbl.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(28,0)
        lbl.Text = s.name
        lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180,210,255)
        lbl.TextSize = 12
        lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
        lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        lbl.ZIndex = 16
        lbl.Parent = row

        local arrow = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        arrow.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(16,16)
        arrow.Position = UDim2.new(1,-20,.5,0)
        arrow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0,.5)
        arrow.Text = "›"
        arrow.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80,120,220)
        arrow.TextSize = 16
        arrow.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        arrow.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        arrow.ZIndex = 16
        arrow.Parent = row

        -- Hover
        row.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            Tween(row, {BackgroundTransparency=0.4}, .15)
            Tween(lbl, {TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(220,235,255)}, .15)
        end)
        row.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            Tween(row, {BackgroundTransparency=0.7}, .15)
            Tween(lbl, {TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(180,210,255)}, .15)
        end)
        row.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            setclipboard(s.url)
            local prev = lbl.Text
            lbl.Text = "Copied!"
            lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(16,185,129)
            task.delay(1.5, function()
                lbl.Text = prev
                lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180,210,255)
            end)
        end)
    end

    -- ── FOOTER ──
    local Footer = Instance.new("Frame")
    Footer.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,44)
    Footer.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,1,-44)
    Footer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Footer.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Footer.ZIndex = 12
    Footer.Parent = Main

    -- Footer separator - inset from sides so it doesn't touch corners
    local FooterSep = Instance.new("Frame")
    FooterSep.Size = UDim2.new(1,-40,0,1)
    FooterSep.Position = UDim2.new(0,20,0,0)
    FooterSep.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30,60,140)
    FooterSep.BackgroundTransparency = 0.55
    FooterSep.ZIndex = 13
    FooterSep.Parent = Footer

    local FooterLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    FooterLabel.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1,1)
    FooterLabel.Text = "Key System  —  discord.gg/HpJhQJRNMy"
    FooterLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80,110,180)
    FooterLabel.TextSize = 12
    FooterLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
    FooterLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    FooterLabel.ZIndex = 13
    FooterLabel.Parent = Footer

    -- ── MOBILE SCALING ──
    -- Detects viewport size and scales down on small screens
    local function ApplyResponsive()
        local vp = workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize
        local w, h = vp.X, vp.Y
        if w < 600 or h < 500 then
            -- Mobile: shrink to fill screen width, reduce height
            local scale = math.min(w / 820, h / 520)
            scale = math.max(scale, 0.52)
            Main.Size = UDim2.new(0, math.floor(780*scale), 0, math.floor(480*scale))
        else
            Main.Size = UDim2.new(0, 780, 0, 480)
        end
    end
    ApplyResponsive()
    workspace.CurrentCamera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(ApplyResponsive)

    -- ── STATUS FEEDBACK ──
    local function SetStatus(text, col)
        StatusLabel.Text = text
        StatusLabel.TextColor3 = col or Color3.fromRGB(80,140,255)
    end

    -- ── REDEEM LOGIC ──
    EnterBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local key = KeyBox.Text:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$"):upper()
        if key == "" then
            SetStatus("⚠ Please enter a key first.", Color3.fromRGB(254,188,46))
            return
        end
        SetStatus("Verifying...", Color3.fromRGB(80,140,255))
        EnterBtn.Text = "..."
        EnterBtn.Active = false

        local result = Junkie.check_key(key)

        EnterBtn.Active = true
        EnterBtn.Text = "Enter"

        if not result then
            SetStatus("✗ Request failed. Try again.", Color3.fromRGB(239,68,68))
            return
        end

        if result.valid then
            saveKey(key)
            getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = key
            SetStatus("✓ Access Granted!", Color3.fromRGB(16,185,129))
            task.wait(0.9)
            SetBlur(false)            Tween(Main, {
                Position = UDim2.new(.5,0,.5,80),
                BackgroundTransparency = 1
            }, .6, Enum.EasingStyle.Exponential, Enum.EasingDirection.In)
            task.delay(.65, function() Screen:Destroy() end)
        else
            SetStatus("✗ " .. (result.message or "Invalid key."), Color3.fromRGB(239,68,68))
            Tween(InputFrame, {BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(60,8,8)}, .2)
            task.delay(.4, function()
                Tween(InputFrame, {BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8,14,38)}, .3)
            end)
        end
    end)

    CopyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local link = Junkie.get_key_link()
        if link and link ~= "" then
            setclipboard(link)
            local prev = CopyBtn.Text
            CopyBtn.Text = "✓ Link Copied! Open in browser"
            CopyBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(16,185,129)
            task.delay(2.5, function()
                CopyBtn.Text = prev
                CopyBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(160,195,255)
            end)
        else
            local prev = CopyBtn.Text
            CopyBtn.Text = "✗ Failed to get link"
            CopyBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(239,68,68)
            task.delay(2, function()
                CopyBtn.Text = prev
                CopyBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(160,195,255)
            end)
        end
    end)

    -- ── ENTRANCE ANIMATION ──
    Main.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Main.Position = UDim2.new(.5,0,.5,70)
    Tween(Main, {
        Position = UDim2.new(.5,0,.5,0),
        BackgroundTransparency = 0.08
    }, .9, Enum.EasingStyle.Exponential)

    return Screen
end

-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
-- ENTRY POINT
-- ──────────────────────────────────────────
local saved = loadKey()
local toCheck = (saved and saved ~= "") and saved or
                (type(getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY) == "string" and getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY ~= "" and getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY or nil)

if toCheck then
    -- Check saved key first BEFORE showing UI
    local preCheck = Junkie.check_key(toCheck)
    if preCheck and preCheck.valid then
        if preCheck.message == "KEYLESS" then
            getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = "KEYLESS"
        else
            if not saved then saveKey(toCheck) end
            getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = toCheck
        end
        -- Key valid, skip UI entirely
    else
        -- Saved key expired/invalid, clear it and show UI
        if fsOk then pcall(function() delfile("wh01am_key.txt") end) end
        getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = nil
        Build()
        while not getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY do
            task.wait(0.1)
        end
    end
else
    -- No saved key, show UI
    Build()
    while not getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY do
        task.wait(0.1)
    end
end
